channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former senior police officers jailed for corruption in 2018 murder case
item.description: The Pinetown Regional Court recently handed down sentences of 17 years’ imprisonment each to former Lieutenant Colonel Khephu Ndlovu and Sergeant Bonginkosi Dlamini for corruption and defeating the ad...

item.title: Tigers coach Benji Marshall comments on Terrell and Taylan May re-signings
item.description: Tigers coach Benji Marshall has spoken publicly about the recent contract extensions for players Terrell and Taylan May. Marshall highlighted the importance of retaining key talent in order to strengt...

item.title: AFP lauds Atin Ito Coalition for peaceful assertion of Philippine presence in West PH Sea
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) lauded the Atin Ito Coalition for their successful mission in the West Philippine Sea, particularly for planting the Philippine flag on ...

item.title: Louisiana delays U.S. House primaries to redraw congressional map after Supreme Court ruling
item.description: Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry has issued an executive order delaying the state’s congressional primary elections for the U.S. House of Representatives, originally scheduled for May 16, in response to...

item.title: Janet Mills suspends Maine Senate campaign, leaving Graham Platner to take on Susan Collins
item.description: Maine Governor Janet Mills has suspended her campaign for the U.S. Senate, effectively ending her bid to unseat Republican Senator Susan Collins in the 2026 race. In a statement, Mills cited a lack of...

item.title: Supreme Court to Hear PIL Seeking Stricter Aadhaar Issuance Rules for Adolescents and Adults
item.description: The Supreme Court of India is scheduled to hear a Public Interest Litigation (PIL) on 4th May regarding the issuance of Aadhaar cards to citizens, particularly focusing on adolescents and adults. The ...

item.title: NLC and TUC Lead Nationwide May Day Protest for ₦154,000 Minimum Wage
item.description: This 2026 May Day, Nigeria Labour Congress (NLC) and Trade Union Congress (TUC) don change the game. No be stadium palava again, workers don hit the streets nationwide dey protest say the current ₦70,...

item.title: Four men face triple murder charges as court finds case to answer
item.description: In the Pietermaritzburg High Court, four men – Sandile Madlala, Sabelo Madlala, Lethukuthula Khumalo, and Thabiso Cedric Nkosi – have denied conspiring to commit a triple murder in August 2020. The vi...

item.title: Protest in Pune Over Murder and Sexual Assault of 3-Year-Old Disrupts Highway Traffic
item.description: Traffic on the Mumbai-Bengaluru highway in Pune district, Maharashtra, was severely affected on Saturday as hundreds of residents staged a protest over the sexual assault and murder of a 3.5-year-old ...

item.title: Emir of Katsina installs Governor Radda’s son and two others as district heads
item.description: On Saturday, the Emir of Katsina, Abdulmumini Kabir Usman, held one big turbaning ceremony to formally appoint three new district heads, including the son of Katsina State Governor Dikko Umaru Radda. ...

item.title: Revisiting Domestic Disputes: How Couples and Families Navigate Everyday Conflicts
item.description: Since 2021, The Guardian's 'You Be the Judge' column has explored minor domestic disputes, ranging from shared toothbrushes to disagreements over water bladders during intimate moments. The column exa...

item.title: Nine people die in fire at residential building in Delhi’s Vivek Vihar; rescue operations continue
item.description: Early on Sunday morning, a tragic fire broke out in a residential building in Delhi’s Vivek Vihar, leading to the death of nine people. The incident occurred around 3:48 am, and Delhi Fire Services re...

item.title: House Plans to Approve National Land Use Act and 4Ps Amendments This Week
item.description: The House of Representatives is set to prioritize the approval of two key Legislative-Executive Development Advisory Council (LEDAC) bills as it resumes sessions this week, according to House Majority...

item.title: The ongoing role of B-BBEE in addressing structural inequality in South Africa
item.description: This opinion piece argues that Black Economic Empowerment (BEE), particularly in its evolved form as Broad-Based Black Economic Empowerment (B-BBEE), remains essential to South Africa’s efforts to add...

item.title: Trump Plans Significant U.S. Troop Reductions in Germany Amid Tensions With European Allies
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that the United States will significantly reduce its troop presence in Germany, escalating tensions with European allies, particularly Chancellor Friedrich Merz. While...

item.title: Ogun State Police Clarify No Bandits Operate in State Forests
item.description: Ogun State Police don come out to clear confusion over one viral video wey dey float for social media, wey people dey claim sey armed bandits dey operate for one forest inside Ogun State. The Police P...

item.title: Saturday Night Live mocks Pete Hegseth and Kash Patel in White House sketch
item.description: Saturday Night Live (SNL) recently aired a cold open sketch that satirised Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth and FBI Director Kash Patel. In the sketch, Colin Jost portrayed Hegseth, boasting about the U...

item.title: Karachi Records 42°C Amid Continued Heatwave, No Rain Expected
item.description: KARACHI: The city of Karachi experienced intense heat on Sunday as the mercury soared to 42 degrees Celsius. According to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD), sea breezes are expected to retu...

item.title: Zack Polanski and the Green Party Face Intense Media Scrutiny
item.description: The Green Party in the UK, under the leadership of Zack Polanski, has recently attracted significant media attention as it rises in the national opinion polls. Much of the coverage has ranged from leg...

item.title: NBA stars praise RJ Barrett after clutch Game 6 winner for the Raptors
item.description: RJ Barrett delivered a standout performance for the Toronto Raptors, sealing a crucial Game 6 victory with a game-winning shot that quickly drew attention across the basketball world. The clutch momen...
